prompt: A striking black and white close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="handsome young Asian man"} with {argument name="hair style" default="messy wet hair sticking to his forehead"}. His face and neck are glistening, covered in highly detailed {argument name="skin texture detail" default="water droplets and sweat"}. He has an intense, melancholic gaze directed off-camera to the left. The lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, emphasizing his sharp jawline, full lips, and specular highlights on the wet skin against a {argument name="background" default="pitch-black background"}. Shot in a photorealistic, high-fashion editorial style with cinematic chiaroscuro.
translatedPrompt: 一张引人注目的黑白特写肖像，主角是 {argument name="subject description" default="一位英俊的年轻亚洲男性"}，留着 {argument name="hair style" default="凌乱且贴在额头上的湿发"}。他的脸部和颈部闪烁着光泽，布满了高度精细的 {argument name="skin texture detail" default="水珠和汗水"}。他眼神深邃忧郁，凝视着镜头左侧。光影效果戏剧且对比强烈，突显了他棱角分明的下颌线、丰满的嘴唇以及湿润皮肤上在 {argument name="background" default="纯黑背景"} 衬托下的高光细节。采用写实的高级时尚编辑风格拍摄，呈现出电影般的明暗对照效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 戏剧性湿发肖像摄影：生成一张高度逼真、高对比度的黑白肖像，强调湿润的皮肤质感和戏剧性的光影效果。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
